creator: ports@toco-domains.de
text:
Created attachment 168863
patch with update to 2.7.1

Hello,

attached a patch to update gitlab-shell to its current version 2.7.1. This is also some pre-work in order to allow the next update of our new port www/gitlab. :)

poudriere is fine for FreeBSD 9.3, 10.1 and 10.2 for i386 and amd64.

And i test it against the new GitLab port, which still works fine.

Greetings,
Torsten
